1<?php

3namespace BookStack\Util;
4
5use BookStack\App\AppVersion;
6use HTMLPurifier;
7use HTMLPurifier_Config;
8use HTMLPurifier_DefinitionCache_Serializer;
9use HTMLPurifier_HTML5Config;
10use HTMLPurifier_HTMLDefinition;
11
12/**
13 * Provides a configured HTML Purifier instance.
14 * https://github.com/ezyang/htmlpurifier
15 * Also uses this to extend support to HTML5 elements:
16 * https://github.com/xemlock/htmlpurifier-html5
17 */
18class ConfiguredHtmlPurifier
19{
20    protected HTMLPurifier $purifier;
21    protected static bool $cachedChecked = false;
22
23    public function __construct()
24    {
25        // This is done by the web-server at run-time, with the existing
26        // storage/framework/cache folder to ensure we're using a server-writable folder.
27        $cachePath = storage_path('framework/cache/purifier');
28        $this->createCacheFolderIfNeeded($cachePath);
29
30        $config = HTMLPurifier_HTML5Config::createDefault();
31        $this->setConfig($config, $cachePath);
32        $this->resetCacheIfNeeded($config);
33
34        $htmlDef = $config->getDefinition('HTML', true, true);
35        if ($htmlDef instanceof HTMLPurifier_HTMLDefinition) {
36            $this->configureDefinition($htmlDef);
37        }
38
39        $this->purifier = new HTMLPurifier($config);
40    }
41
42    protected function createCacheFolderIfNeeded(string $cachePath): void
43    {
44        if (!file_exists($cachePath)) {
45            mkdir($cachePath, 0777, true);
46        }
47    }
48
49    protected function resetCacheIfNeeded(HTMLPurifier_Config $config): void
50    {
51        if (self::$cachedChecked) {
52            return;
53        }
54
55        $cachedForVersion = cache('htmlpurifier::cache-version');
56        $appVersion = AppVersion::get();
57        if ($cachedForVersion !== $appVersion) {
58            foreach (['HTML', 'CSS', 'URI'] as $name) {
59                $cache = new HTMLPurifier_DefinitionCache_Serializer($name);
60                $cache->flush($config);
61            }
62            cache()->set('htmlpurifier::cache-version', $appVersion);
63        }
64
65        self::$cachedChecked = true;
66    }
67
68    protected function setConfig(HTMLPurifier_Config $config, string $cachePath): void
69    {
70        $config->set('Cache.SerializerPath', $cachePath);
71        $config->set('Core.AllowHostnameUnderscore', true);
72        $config->set('CSS.AllowTricky', true);
73        $config->set('HTML.SafeIframe', true);
74        $config->set('HTML.TargetNoopener', false);
75        $config->set('HTML.TargetNoreferrer', false);
76        $config->set('Attr.EnableID', true);
77        $config->set('Attr.ID.HTML5', true);
78        $config->set('Output.FixInnerHTML', false);
79        $config->set('URI.SafeIframeRegexp', '%^(http://|https://|//)%');
80        $config->set('URI.AllowedSchemes', [
81            'http' => true,
82            'https' => true,
83            'mailto' => true,
84            'ftp' => true,
85            'nntp' => true,
86            'news' => true,
87            'tel' => true,
88            'file' => true,
89        ]);
90
91         // $config->set('Cache.DefinitionImpl', null); // Disable cache during testing
92    }
93
94    public function configureDefinition(HTMLPurifier_HTMLDefinition $definition): void
95    {
96        // Allow the object element
97        $definition->addElement(
98            'object',
99            'Inline',
100            'Flow',
101            'Common',
102            [
103                'data'   => 'URI',
104                'type'   => 'Text',
105                'width'  => 'Length',
106                'height' => 'Length',
107            ]
108        );
109
110        // Allow the embed element
111        $definition->addElement(
112            'embed',
113            'Inline',
114            'Empty',
115            'Common',
116            [
117                'src'   => 'URI',
118                'type'   => 'Text',
119                'width'  => 'Length',
120                'height' => 'Length',
121            ]
122        );
123
124        // Allow checkbox inputs
125        $definition->addElement(
126            'input',
127            'Formctrl',
128            'Empty',
129            'Common',
130            [
131                'checked' => 'Bool#checked',
132                'disabled' => 'Bool#disabled',
133                'name' => 'Text',
134                'readonly' => 'Bool#readonly',
135                'type' => 'Enum#checkbox',
136                'value' => 'Text',
137            ]
138        );
139
140        // Allow the drawio-diagram attribute on div elements
141        $definition->addAttribute(
142            'div',
143            'drawio-diagram',
144            'Number',
145        );
146
147        // Allow target="_blank" on links
148        $definition->addAttribute('a', 'target', 'Enum#_blank');
149
150        // Allow mention-ids on links
151        $definition->addAttribute('a', 'data-mention-user-id', 'Number');
152    }
153
154    public function purify(string $html): string
155    {
156        return $this->purifier->purify($html);
157    }
158}
